source: Transcribed verbatim from the mod's leader card scans (client/public/dune/<image>.png, GUIDs per scene.json leaders[]). complexity = hex-dot count after the name. Base game = 8 leaders; Rise of Ix adds the other 6 (Vernius, Ecaz, Moritani houses). Ix signets reference Ix systems (tech tiles, freighter track, Snoopers, dreadnoughts) - refine icon readings against the Ix rules when implementing that option.

passive.title: Prescience
passive.text: You may look at the top card of your deck at any time.

passive.title: Landsraad Popularity
passive.text: Sending an Agent to a Landsraad (green) board space costs you 1 solari less.

signet.title: Prudent Diplomacy
signet.text: Pay 1 spice: gain one Influence with a Faction where an opponent has more Influence than you.

passive.title: Masterstroke
passive.text: At start of game, secretly choose 2 Factions. When you deploy 4+ troops to the Conflict in a turn, reveal your choices and gain one Influence with each.

signet.title: Scheme
signet.text: Pay 1 solari: draw an Intrigue card.

passive.title: Arrakis Fiefdom
passive.text: You start the game with additional resources: 1 spice and 1 solari.

signet.title: Brutality
signet.text: Recruit 1 troop - or 2 troops if you have at least one Faction Alliance.

passive.title: Spice Addict
passive.text: Whenever you harvest spice, gain 1 less and draw a card.

passive.title: Connections
passive.text: When you take a High Council seat: gain one Influence with any one Faction.

passive.title: Ruthless Negotiator
passive.text: Whenever you pay solari for the cost of a board space: draw a card.

passive.title: Eyes Everywhere
passive.text: Enemy Agents don't block your Agents at Landsraad (green) or City (circle) board spaces.

signet.title: Manipulate
signet.text: Remove and replace a card in the Imperium Row. During your Reveal turn this round, you may acquire the removed card for 1 persuasion less.

signet.title: Ixian Technology
signet.text: Icons: green tech-card OR orange-based gear hex (tech tile acquisition/discount - confirm vs Ix rules).

passive.title: Careful Observation
passive.text: Game Start: put a Snooper token at 2 Influence on each Influence track. Whenever you reach a Snooper token, move it to the topmost uncovered space above and take that reward. Snooper rewards (bottom to top): trash the token for 1 spice; gain the bonus from this token's track; gain one Influence on this token's track; gain the bonus from this token's track and one Influence on that track.

signet.title: Duplicity
signet.text: Lose one Influence: gain one Influence with a Faction where you have a Snooper token.

passive.title: Coordination
passive.text: Reveal Turn: if you have at least two Agents on Landsraad (green) / City (circle) / yellow-triangle board spaces, you may trash one of your cards in play.

signet.title: Conscript
signet.text: You may acquire a card that costs 3 persuasion or less.

passive.title: One Step Ahead
passive.text: Round Start: set aside a card from your hand. At the start of your second turn in a round, reveal that card and return it to your hand. If you use it to send an Agent this turn: if it has exactly one Agent icon, gain 1 spice; otherwise, gain 1 solari.

signet.title: Guild Contacts
signet.text: Pay 1 solari: acquire a Foldspace card.

passive.title: Intelligence
passive.text: At the start of the game, look at the top two cards of the Intrigue deck. Keep one and put the other back on top.

signet.title: Couriers
signet.text: Pay 1 spice: gain [green shield icon] (Ix freighter/shipping advance - confirm vs Ix rules).

passive.title: Smuggling Operation
passive.text: You start the game with no water. Whenever you gain solari on your turn, increase the amount gained by 1.

signet.title: Final Delivery
signet.text: Pay 7 solari: gain one Influence with any one Faction, 1 troop, and 1 spice.
